import React,{useEffect,useCallback}from"react";// Mutate state if click occurs outside element with className
var useBlurSetState=function useBlurSetState(className,state,setState){var handleClick=useCallback(function(e){var elem=document.querySelector(className);if(!elem){setState(false);return;}if(!elem.contains(e.target))setState(false);},[]);useEffect(function(){if(state){document.addEventListener("click",handleClick);}else{document.removeEventListener("click",handleClick);}},[state]);};export default useBlurSetState;
